items.name: loyal-studio/Honami-Animation-System
items.full_text: Honami Animation System is a complete, from-scratch alternative to Unity's built-in Animator. Designed for Unity 6, it gives you a powerful node-graph editor, built-in procedural rigging and seamless Timeline integration - all at zero runtime allocation cost.
